actions.title: Show capability guide
actions.intent: Print the human-readable AletheiaOS capability guide.

actions.title: Orient on project truth
actions.intent: Read stable AletheiaOS truth files and active node records.

actions.title: Orient with runtime context
actions.intent: Read stable project truth and append current run/session context.

actions.title: Build context pack
actions.intent: Build a compact context pack from stable truth, capabilities, source summary, and record inventory.

actions.title: Build prompt-ready system context
actions.intent: Build a single prompt-ready context block from stable truth, user preferences, capabilities, and optional runtime context.

actions.title: Build prompt-ready system context with runtime
actions.intent: Build prompt-ready context and append current run and recent session context.

actions.title: Refresh status
actions.intent: Read active state, validation, record counts, and runtime gate status.

actions.title: Run hook-free preflight
actions.intent: Read context, model gate, validation, git status, checkpoint candidate state, and recommended next actions.

actions.title: Validate project truth
actions.intent: Check whether AletheiaOS truth state is coherent.

actions.title: Preview checkpoint
actions.intent: Validate and show checkpoint candidates without staging or committing files.

actions.title: Create checkpoint
actions.intent: Validate, screen paths, stage durable AletheiaOS state files, and create an attributed commit.

actions.title: Audit capability coverage
actions.intent: Check that runtime scripts, skills, review agents, CRUD commands, and action layer entries are documented.

actions.title: List truth records
actions.intent: List records for a truth entity such as evidence, decisions, contracts, hypotheses, risks, nodes, or session notes.

inputs.entity: Truth entity to list, for example evidence or decisions.

actions.title: Create truth record
actions.intent: Create a template-backed truth record.

inputs.entity: Truth entity, for example evidence or decisions.
inputs.title: Record title.

actions.title: Show truth record
actions.intent: Read one truth record or fixed truth file.

inputs.entity: Truth entity, for example evidence, decisions, or capability-map.
inputs.id: Record id, or current for fixed truth files.

actions.title: Update truth record
actions.intent: Update the status for an existing truth record.

inputs.entity: Truth entity, for example evidence or decisions.
inputs.id: Record id, or current for fixed truth files.

actions.title: Archive truth record
actions.intent: Archive a truth record or fixed truth file with a reason.

inputs.entity: Truth entity, for example evidence or decisions.
inputs.id: Record id, or current for fixed truth files.

actions.title: Inventory project sources
actions.intent: Classify project source material into a generated inventory.

actions.title: Prepare guided bootstrap report
actions.intent: Generate a bootstrap truth inventory report from source inventory.

actions.title: Finalize bootstrap
actions.intent: Validate, install hooks, write bootstrap session state, and checkpoint unless skipped.

actions.title: Generate overview
actions.intent: Write local AletheiaOS overview JSON and HTML.

actions.title: Export public overview
actions.intent: Write overview JSON and HTML under docs/overview.

actions.title: List model registry entries
actions.intent: Read registered models and model gate policy state.

actions.title: Register model
actions.intent: Register a model for model-gate decisions.

actions.title: Show model registry entry
actions.intent: Read one registered model entry.

actions.title: Enable model registry entry
actions.intent: Mark a model registry entry enabled.

actions.title: Disable model registry entry
actions.intent: Mark a model registry entry disabled.

actions.title: Deprecate model registry entry
actions.intent: Mark a model registry entry deprecated with an explicit reason.

actions.title: Remove model registry entry
actions.intent: Remove a model registry entry.

actions.title: Deny model id
actions.intent: Add a model id to the model-gate denylist.

actions.title: Remove model id from denylist
actions.intent: Remove a model id from the model-gate denylist.

inputs.model_id: Provider model id to remove from denylist.
